title: Myriom's Nukes
description: Bring unimaginable power to your Minecraft world with Nukes.
body:
![Nukes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/08e08429e9f2b59915ed354f36dec624a6b71d6d.png)
# Bring unimaginable power to your Minecraft world with **Nukes**.  
This mod introduces a range of deadly explosives, from simple high-yield bombs to catastrophic nuclear weapons capable of reshaping the landscape in seconds. Whether you want to test your engineering skills, wage large-scale battles, or just watch the world burn, this mod delivers the firepower you’re looking for.

![Features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/de07408eebdfae77e712b955276d984c5768cac0_0.webp)
- Multiple bomb types, ranging from compact charges to massive nukes
- Massive explosions with realistic blast radii that can level mountains or wipe out cities
- Custom ores and materials used to craft advanced weaponry
- Full redstone compatibility, allowing bombs to be triggered with redstone, timers, or automation
- Balanced crafting recipes to ensure powerful items require effort and rare resources

![Important](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/48df8af87a7dde92f199bed5821ecbde2bf0a1b5_0.webp)
This mod requires a lot of **RAM**, especially for the higher-performance versions!
This is because, at one point, the Nukes destroy over 1 million blocks at once!
I would personally recommend sticking with the medium-performance version, as running the higher-performance ones requires an extremely powerful PC with a lot of RAM.
You can find **Uranium Ore** in the Overworld between heights **-34 and -64**, and **Plutonium Ore** in the End between **0 and 30**.
## **Please let me know by commenting if you have any ideas for improvements or suggestions on what to add or change!**

![Bombs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/90f3c66a37df079b9b22ba59dbb96c1e5782761d_0.webp)

### These are the **estimated explosion sizes** for each Nuke, depending on your selected **performance version.**
### (Radii are measured in blocks, and total blocks show the approximate number of destroyed blocks if a full sphere were cleared (at once).)
## 
**Very High Performance:**
- **Little Boy:** Radius = 80x80 | Blocks destroyed = 2,142,661
- **Fat Man:** Radius = 160x160 | Blocks destroyed = 17,141,287
- **Hydrogen Bomb:** 320x320 | Blocks destroyed = 137,130,297
- **Castle Bravo:** 640x640 | Blocks destroyed = 1,097,041,524
- **Tsar Bomba:** 1,280x1,280 | Blocks destroyed = 8,786,146,190
- **Antimatter Bomb:** 2.560x2.560 | Blocks destroyed = 70,289,169,155
  
**High Performance:**
- **Little Boy:** Radius = 40x40 | Blocks destroyed = 268,083
- **Fat Man:** Radius = 80x80 | Blocks destroyed = 2,142,661
- **Hydrogen Bomb:** 160x160 | Blocks destroyed = 17,141,287
- **Castle Bravo:** 320x320 | Blocks destroyed = 137,130,297
- **Tsar Bomba:** 640x640 | Blocks destroyed = 1,097,041,524
- **Antimatter Bomb:** 1,280x1,280 | Blocks destroyed = 8,786,146,190

**Medium Performance:**
- **Little Boy:** Radius = 20x20 | Blocks destroyed = 33,510
- **Fat Man:** Radius = 40x40 | Blocks destroyed = 268,083
- **Hydrogen Bomb:** 80x80 | Blocks destroyed = 2,142,661
- **Castle Bravo:** 160x160 | Blocks destroyed = 17,141,287
- **Tsar Bomba:** 320x320 | Blocks destroyed = 137,130,297
- **Antimatter Bomb:** 640x640 | Blocks destroyed = 1,097,041,524
  
**Low Performance:**
- **Little Boy:** Radius = 10x10 | Blocks destroyed = 4,189
- **Fat Man:** Radius = 20x20 | Blocks destroyed = 33,510
- **Hydrogen Bomb:** 40x40 | Blocks destroyed = 268,083
- **Castle Bravo:** 80x80 | Blocks destroyed = 2,142,661
- **Tsar Bomba:** 160x160 | Blocks destroyed = 17,141,287
- **Antimatter Bomb:** 320x320 | Blocks destroyed = 137,130,297
  
**Very Low Performance:**
- **Little Boy:** Radius = 5x5 | Blocks destroyed = 523
- **Fat Man:** Radius = 10x10 | Blocks destroyed = 4,189
- **Hydrogen Bomb:** 20x20 | Blocks destroyed = 33,510
- **Castle Bravo:** 40x40 | Blocks destroyed = 268,083
- **Tsar Bomba:** 80x80 | Blocks destroyed = 2,142,661
- **Antimatter Bomb:** 160x160 | Blocks destroyed = 17,141,287

![Warning](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/643593818496ac2191bf6fe104f258dab9750abe_0.webp)
### These weapons are extremely destructive. Use them responsibly, or embrace the chaos.
